name: BASF SE
lede: BASF runs eleven capability centers across ten Indian cities. Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad, Ankleshwar, Bharuch, Kharagpur, Mangaluru, Mumbai, Kanchipuram and Pune, covering gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BASF office in India. We map eleven, across ten cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BASF SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BASF runs 11 verified GCC centers across 10 Indian cities (Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad, Ankleshwar, Bharuch, Kharagpur, Mangaluru, Mumbai, Kanchipuram, Pune), covering gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: BASF's India footprint covers Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad, Ankleshwar, Bharuch, Kharagpur, Mangaluru, Mumbai, Kanchipuram and Pune, spanning gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 73 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BASF operate in India?
faq.a: BASF operates 11 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Twelve are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BASF have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BASF's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad, Ankleshwar, Bharuch, Kharagpur, Mangaluru, Mumbai, Kanchipuram and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BASF run in India?
faq.a: BASF runs gbs, it, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BASF's India GCCs?
faq.a: BASF's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BASF's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 73 leaders at BASF's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
